headline: Target's Same-Day Fulfillment Ecosystem Boosts Customer Engagement
summary: TGT's same-day delivery grows 30% in fiscal 2025, with Drive Up, pickup and Circle 360 helping generate $14B and about two-thirds of digital revenues.

headline: UGG And Teva Sustainability Push Meets Deckers Valuation And Momentum Questions
summary: UGG and Teva, both owned by Deckers Outdoor, announced new Spring 2026 collections focused on sustainable materials and product evolution. UGG introduced the Spring 2026 Golden Collection, adding sandals and clogs aimed at year round comfort using premium and recycled inputs. Teva revealed an expanded Spring 2026 range, including refreshed Hurricane models and new designs geared toward outdoor use and environmental stewardship. Deckers Outdoor (NYSE:DECK) is rolling out these product lines...
